bio: Backend Software Engineer with 5+ years of experience building scalable APIs, microservices, and distributed systems across cloud environments. Strong expertise in Golang, Java, Python, and backend service design, with hands-on experience in AWS, Docker, and CI/CD pipelines.

Proven ability to improve system performance, reliability, and observability in production environments. Experienced in developing data processing workflows and integrating backend services to support real-world business applications.
